Objective: Compile product intent into inspectable artifacts.
Scope:
- Capture objective, scope, constraints, and success criteria.
- Keep extraction explicit and deterministic.
Constraints:
- Avoid fabricated certainty.
- Keep architecture modular.
Success Criteria:
- Objective is extracted.
- Scope contains at least one concrete work item.
Output Expectations:
- A canonical intent artifact for downstream workflows.
